title: ETH crash to $1K looms if key support breaks: Will futures traders step in?
summary: ETH crash to $1K looms if key support breaks: Will futures traders step in?

briefing: Kristin Smith urged the Senate to preserve developer protections in the CLARITY Act, arguing open-source builders should not be regulated as financial intermediaries.

summary: BBB refers prediction market Kalshi to state regulators over ad inquiry
